cli/overview.description: The safrochaind command-line interface — global flags, keyring backends, query/tx patterns, fees, gas, and broadcast modes.

cli/query.description: Every read-only namespace exposed by safrochaind query.

cli/tx.description: Every signing namespace exposed by safrochaind tx, plus broadcast workflows.

developers/cosmjs.title: CosmJS examples (testnet)
developers/cosmjs.description: Copy/paste CosmJS snippets for Safrochain testnet: query balances, query validators, sign and broadcast a send transaction.

developers/ibc-transfer.title: IBC transfers for apps (ICS-20)
developers/ibc-transfer.description: How to send an IBC token transfer from a Safrochain app using CosmJS (ICS-20), plus how to choose channel IDs and timeouts.

developers/quickstart.title: Build on Safrochain: developer quickstart
developers/quickstart.description: Choose an RPC/REST endpoint, query chain state, broadcast a transaction, and subscribe to events on Safrochain testnet.

getting-started/quick-links.title: Quick links
getting-started/quick-links.description: Official Safrochain URLs and developer endpoints.

getting-started/what-is-safrochain.title: What is Safrochain?
getting-started/what-is-safrochain.description: Vision, positioning, and what Safrochain solves: a Cosmos SDK Layer-1 for mobile-first payments, local currencies, stablecoins, remittances, and IBC-connected economies.

ibc/channels.title: Channels
ibc/channels.description: Canonical IBC channel registry for Safrochain mainnet, opens at launch (Q3 2026).

ibc/hermes-setup.title: Hermes relayer setup
ibc/hermes-setup.description: Full Hermes config template, systemd unit, and health checks for relaying Safrochain.

ibc/overview.title: Safrochain IBC overview
ibc/overview.description: How Safrochain participates in the Cosmos IBC ecosystem — clients, connections, channels, packets, and supported tokens for cross-chain transfers.

intro.title: Introduction to Safrochain
intro.description: Start here. What Safrochain is, how it works, and how to use these docs to build, validate, or run a node on the Cosmos SDK Layer-1.

modules/auth.title: Auth
modules/auth.description: Accounts, sequences, module accounts, and bech32 helpers: safrochaind query auth.

modules/authz.title: Authz
modules/authz.description: Generic authorizations to execute messages on someone else's behalf: query and tx authz.

modules/bank.title: Bank
modules/bank.description: Balances, supply, denom metadata, and token transfers: query and tx bank commands.

modules/clock.title: Clock
modules/clock.description: Register CosmWasm contracts for periodic clock ticks: queries and register, unregister, unjail transactions.

modules/consensus.title: Consensus
modules/consensus.description: CometBFT-related consensus queries and module consensus params.

modules/crisis.title: Crisis
modules/crisis.description: Invariant violation proofs submitted by validators: tx crisis invariant-broken.

modules/cw-hooks.title: CW Hooks
modules/cw-hooks.description: Register CosmWasm contracts for staking and governance sudo hooks: queries and register or unregister transactions.

modules/distribution.title: Distribution
modules/distribution.description: Rewards, commissions, community pool: distribution queries and withdraw transactions.

modules/drip.title: Drip
modules/drip.description: Drip distributes tokens to stakers; module params and the distribute-tokens transaction.

modules/feegrant.title: Fee grant
modules/feegrant.description: Grant and revoke allowances so another account can pay fees: query and tx feegrant.

modules/feepay.title: FeePay
modules/feepay.description: FeePay registers CosmWasm contracts that can pay fees on behalf of users, with eligibility and usage queries.

modules/feeshare.title: FeeShare
modules/feeshare.description: Route a share of smart-contract execution fees to deployers and withdrawers: queries and registration transactions.

modules/globalfee.title: Global fee
modules/globalfee.description: Chain-wide minimum gas prices via the globalfee module: CLI queries and governance-only parameter updates.

modules/gov.title: Governance
modules/gov.description: Proposals, deposits, votes, and tally: governance queries and submission transactions.

modules/ibc-core.title: IBC core
modules/ibc-core.description: IBC clients, connections, and channels: query ibc and tx ibc for core handshake operations.

modules/ibc-fee.title: IBC fee (relayer incentives)
modules/ibc-fee.description: Pay fees for incentivized relaying and register payees: query ibc-fee and tx ibc-fee.

modules/ibc-hooks.title: IBC Hooks (`ibchooks`)
modules/ibc-hooks.description: Wasm sender address derivation for IBC Hooks: query ibchooks wasm-sender.

modules/ibc-transfer-app.title: ICS-20 transfer (`ibc-transfer`)
modules/ibc-transfer-app.description: Fungible token transfers over IBC: query ibc-transfer and tx ibc-transfer transfer.

modules/interchain-accounts.description: Controller and host ICA queries and transactions (alias: ica).

modules/interchain-query.description: Async ICQ module parameters: query interchainquery.

modules/mint.title: Mint
modules/mint.description: Inflation and minting parameters: query mint (transactions are governance-controlled).

modules/nft.title: NFT
modules/nft.description: NFT classes and NFT ownership queries and transfers.

modules/overview.title: Safrochain modules overview
modules/overview.description: Every module wired into safrochaind: Safrochain extensions, Cosmos SDK core, IBC, and CosmWasm, with CLI entry points and links to per-module reference pages.

modules/params.title: Params (legacy subspaces)
modules/params.description: Legacy params subspace queries for modules still using the params keeper pattern.

modules/slashing.description: Signing info and downtime penalties: query slashing and tx slashing unjail.

modules/staking.title: Staking
modules/staking.description: Validators, delegations, redelegations, unbonding: staking queries and validator transactions.

modules/tokenfactory.description: Factory-created denoms, admin mint/burn, and metadata: safrochaind query and tx command reference.

modules/upgrade.description: Planned upgrades, applied heights, and authority: query upgrade and governance upgrade proposals.

modules/vesting.title: Vesting
modules/vesting.description: Create vesting and permanently locked accounts: tx vesting.

modules/wasm.description: Store, instantiate, execute, and query CosmWasm contracts: wasm module CLI reference.

run-a-node/snapshots.description: Catch up to chain tip from a tarball snapshot, pruned and archive variants.
